consistency.notes: The feature title, slug, and class are consistent. The mechanics align with high-level Monk abilities, utilizing Ki points for powerful, temporary effects.

quality.notes: This is a powerful capstone-like feature (Level 18). Providing invisibility with damage resistance (excluding force) is a very strong defensive and tactical option for a single action. The ability to cast Astral Projection as a bonus effect adds significant utility for exploration/scouting, although the restriction against bringing others is important.

benefits: Resistance to all damage except force damage

mechanics.balance_assessment: The 4 Ki cost for invisibility and resistance seems balanced for a 18th-level feature, effectively trading a significant chunk of Ki for extreme survivability or stealth. The Astral Projection option offers high utility at a higher cost.

suggestions: Ensure that the duration of invisibility is correctly specified (1 minute).

Clarify if the resistance is active only while invisible, or if the resistance effect is tied to the 1-minute duration regardless of whether invisibility is broken (assuming it lasts the full minute).

extracted_data.name: Empty Body
extracted_data.description:
Beginning at 18th level, you can use your action to spend 4 ki points to become [invisible](#invisible) for 1 minute. During that time, you also have resistance to all damage but force damage.

Additionally, you can spend 8 ki points to cast the [_astral projection_](#astral-projection) spell, without needing material components. When you do so, you can't take any other creatures with you.
